title: Calibrate tokens output (v1)
description: Consumer-facing JSON artifact emitted by the Calibrate token pipeline. Token-centric and DTCG-faithful at the value level; organises per-context variation as overlay maps keyed by the modifier axis (or by partial-tuple for multi-axis tokens).

$schema.description: Optional schema URI for editor tooling.

namespace.description: Token namespace prefix used by the system (e.g. "clbr").

brand.description: Brand key, or null for the unbranded base set.

modifierOrder.description: Modifier axis names in the resolution order. Drives how `defaultContext` and any multi-axis `byContext` keys are interpreted.

defaultContext.description: The modifier values that the top-level `$value` of every token corresponds to.

tokens.description: Map of dotted token path → token entry. Includes both private (primitive) and public (semantic) layer tokens; filter by `$layer` if needed.

path.description: Token path segments (also recoverable by splitting the map key on `.`).

$value.description: Default-context value. Shape depends on `$type` per DTCG.

$extensions.description: Third-party DTCG extensions. Calibrate-internal `dev.msrd.calibrate.*` namespaces are stripped before emission.

$varyingModifiers.description: Modifier axes the token's value actually depends on. Absent when the token is constant across all contexts.

byContext.description: Multi-axis overlay map. Keys are partial tuples mentioning only varying axes (e.g. "theme=darkDefault,forcedColors=on"). Only present when `$varyingModifiers` has 2+ entries.

^by[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*$.description: Single-axis overlay map (e.g. `byTheme`, `bySize`). Keys are values of the varying axis. Only non-default values are listed (the default lives at top-level `$value`). Field name is `by` + capitalized axis name from `modifierOrder`.

$value.description: Override value for this context. Same DTCG shape as the token's default `$value`.
